'''Bow''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked for [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation|Salliche Ag]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ruan]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Bow escorted [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] through Ag's headquarters so that Solo could attempt to free a captive [[Droma]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
